primary.title: Google released a CLI tool that lets AI agents access your Google Workspace
primary.summary: Google Workspace lets AI agents access your entire Google Workspace ecosystem, including tools like Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more.
primary.rankReason: Google发布gws CLI工具，内置MCP Server，让AI代理直接操作Drive/Gmail/Calendar等全套Workspace API，开发者可立即集成使用，对AI Agent生态影响深远

alternates.title: QwenLM/Qwen-Agent
alternates.summary: Agent framework and applications built upon Qwen>=3.0, featuring Function Calling, MCP, Code Interpreter, RAG, Chrome extension, etc.
alternates.rankReason: Qwen-Agent框架持续更新，支持MCP和Function Calling，是开源Agent框架的重要选择，但非全新发布，增量更新降低了新闻性

alternates.title: OpenAI机器人负责人因五角大楼合作协议辞职
alternates.summary: OpenAI机器人部门负责人Caitlin Kalinowski因公司与五角大楼达成AI技术合作协议而辞职，引发业界对AI军事化应用的讨论。
alternates.rankReason: OpenAI机器人负责人因五角大楼合作辞职，Bloomberg/Fortune/TechCrunch等多家权威媒体确认，反映AI伦理与军事化应用的核心争议
